sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the right back, radiating to the groin. He denies seeing blood in his urine. The patient reports nausea and sweating. The patient reports urinary straining.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient reports tenderness over the kidney. The patient reports inflammation over the kidney.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a kidney stone. The patient has a history of kidney stones. The patient's father had kidney stones.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a urine culture. The doctor ordered a BMP. The doctor ordered urinalysis. The doctor prescribed oxycodone. The doctor prescribed Tylenol. The doctor scheduled a follow-up appointment in one to two weeks.
